qa_pairs.question: What are the specific endpoints for the New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage and the Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: The endpoint for New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage is `https://object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca`, and the endpoint for Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage is `https://object-arbutus.cloud.computecanada.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: What is an important consideration regarding bucket Access Control Lists (ACLs) when migrating object storage to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: When migrating object storage, users should be cautious about bucket ACLs because most tools do not preserve them. These ACLs may need to be recreated in the new environment.

qa_pairs.question: Will user and project UUIDs remain the same after migrating object storage to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if you reference any user or project UUIDs, they will be different in the New Arbutus Cloud after migration.
